IST · Lisbon

Profile

About me

Final-year MSc student at IST (Instituto Superior Técnico, Lisbon), specialising in Control, Robotics and AI. Researcher at ISR VISLab, where my work on robotic bin-packing led to a co-authored publication and evolved into my Master's thesis — training RL and supervised models for intelligent 3D object placement. Beyond research, I've taught robotics to kids, designed PCBs for an electric vehicle raced at Goodwood, UK, and managed corporate partnerships for IST's largest ECE job fair. Targeting a summer internship, with full availability from January 2027.

Education

Academic Background

INSTITUTO SUPERIOR TÉCNICO · UNIVERSIDADE DE LISBOA

MSc + BSc in Electrical and Computer Engineering

September 2021 – Present

Core area: Control, Robotics and AI. Secondary area: Circuits and Electronic Systems. Master's thesis on the AI Packbot project — an AI-driven decision model for optimal object placement based on spatial states and semantic constraints (e.g. keeping chemicals away from food, protecting fragile items), integrated with automated robotic pick-and-place. BSc final project: Smart Grid Optimisation through V2G System and Blockchain Transactions.
